issues.description: First effect requires cost DON!! −1, but DSL has no cost specified. DrawCard action should be paired with a cost constraint or the effect should include a cost model.
Condition is 'Always', but card text requires 'If you have 6 or less DON!! cards on your field'. Should be a HasAttachedDon condition with count ≤6.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn', but text says 'during this turn'. Should be 'DuringYourTurn' to match the scope of the attack action.
Target allows choosing any opponent character ('ChooseOpponentCharacter'), but text specifies 'up to 1' which implies optional selection. Scope should reflect optional targeting or max count of 1.
